kling_prompt_sections.camera: 5-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a laptop section in an electronics store; visible product setup: two open laptops on a demo table with specification cards.
kling_prompt_sections.continuity: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a laptop section in an electronics store), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter.
kling_prompt_sections.action_event: a salesperson visibly steps away from the shopper, returns to the background, and stops interacting so the shopper is clearly left alone

reaction_timeline.event: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a laptop section in an electronics store), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter. a salesperson visibly steps away from the shopper, returns to the background, and stops interacting so the shopper is clearly left alone.
customer clearly steps away from the display and turns body away from the product.
gaze moves elsewhere in the store or toward the exit. hands disengage from product entirely.
walks away from the product area alone, leaving the display behind.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no scene change, no new shoppers, no costume change, no product swap, no inconsistent reaction, no enum-like text, no floating labels, no UI overlays

kling_prompt:
Camera: 5-second fixed in-store surveillance-style shot, slightly elevated oblique angle; customer body trajectory, dwell time, hand movement, product display, and counter area visible; face detail is helpful but not required
Scene: a laptop section in an electronics store; visible product setup: two open laptops on a demo table with specification cards.
Continuity: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a laptop section in an electronics store), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter.
Visible intervention: a salesperson visibly steps away from the shopper, returns to the background, and stops interacting so the shopper is clearly left alone
Reaction timeline:
- 0-1s: Continuing from the previous shot in the same store setting (a laptop section in an electronics store), the same single shopper is in the same position with the same products visible. No cuts, no scene change, no new people enter. a salesperson visibly steps away from the shopper, returns to the background, and stops interacting so the shopper is clearly left alone.
- 1-2s: customer clearly steps away from the display and turns body away from the product.
- 2-4s: gaze moves elsewhere in the store or toward the exit. hands disengage from product entirely.
- 4-5s: walks away from the product area alone, leaving the display behind.
Negative constraints: no extreme overhead shot, no tiny distant customer, no occluded product area, no scene change, no new shoppers, no costume change, no product swap, no inconsistent reaction, no enum-like text, no floating labels, no UI overlays
